briefdescription.para: Core and the driver instance are initialized.
To be passed to the connect interrupt callback.

detaileddescription.para: This flag is set to true when the callback has been registered

briefdescription.para: To be passed to the AUX interrupt callback.

detaileddescription.para: This flag is set to true when the callback has been registered

briefdescription.para: To be passed to the Audio interrupt callback.

detaileddescription.para: This flag is set to true when the callback has been registered

briefdescription.para: To be passed to the LNKSTA interrupt callback.

detaileddescription.para: This flag is set to true when the callback has been registered

briefdescription.para: To be passed to the DDC interrupt callback.

detaileddescription.para: This flag is set to true when the callback has been registered

briefdescription.para: To be passed to the stream down callback.

detaileddescription.para: This flag is set to true when the callback has been registered

briefdescription.para: To be passed to the stream start callback.

detaileddescription.para: This flag is set to true when the callback has been registered

briefdescription.para: To be passed to the stream up callback.

detaileddescription.para: This flag is set to true when the callback has been registered

briefdescription.para: To be passed to the hdcp callback.

detaileddescription.para: This flag is set to true when the callback has been registered

briefdescription.para: Callback for hdcp 1.4 protocol event written on the ddc.
To be passed to the hdcp 1.4 protocol event callback.

detaileddescription.para: This flag is set to true when the callback has been registered

briefdescription.para: Callback for hdcp 2.2 protocol event written on the ddc.
To be passed to the hdcp 2.2 protocol event callback.

detaileddescription.para: This flag is set to true when the callback has been registered

briefdescription.para: To be passed to the link error callback.

detaileddescription.para: This flag is set to true when the callback has been registered

briefdescription.para: To be passed to the bridge overflow callback.

detaileddescription.para: This flag is set to true when the callback has been registered

briefdescription.para: To be passed to the link error callback.

detaileddescription.para: This flag is set to true when the callback has been registered

briefdescription.para: To be passed to the link error callback.

detaileddescription.para: This flag is set to true when the callback has been registered

briefdescription.para: Callback for TMDS clock ratio change.
To be passed to the TMDS callback.

detaileddescription.para: This flag is set to true when the callback has been registered

briefdescription.para: To be passed to the vic error callback.

detaileddescription.para: This flag is set to true when the callback has been registered

briefdescription.para: To be passed to the PHY error callback.

detaileddescription.para: This flag is set to true when the callback has been registered
An instance must be allocated for each HDMI RX core in use.
